summary: Large game-mode decomp PR focused mainly on gm_1BA8, with additional gm camera, all-star, opening, result, lbBgFlash, and sislib header/body cleanup. The diff converts several placeholders into C bodies, updates recovered prototypes, removes some pragma steering, introduces narrow helper wrappers, replaces several generated float extern labels with literals, and records automated progress including 3 new matches, 17 improved unmatched items, and one gmopening .sdata2 regression.

key_files.role: Main decomp target; replaces placeholders with bodies for gm_801BAC9C, gm_801BB758, gm_801BBB64, gm_801BC00C, gm_801BCC9C, gm_801BD028, gm_801BF128 and related helper/tactic edits.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_1BA8.c placeholder removals and new function bodies
text_corpus bot report: multiple gm_1BA8 unmatched-item improvements

key_files.role: Header prototype recovery for newly implemented or clarified gm_1BA8 functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS changed to s32/void/HSD_GObj*/GameScene* signatures

key_files.role: Matching cleanup: array indexing in fn_8018A514, float literal cleanup in fn_8018E46C/fn_80190520/fn_80190ABC, and removal of one placeholder marker.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: fn_8018A514 pointer variable removed in favor of entries[i]
text_corpus bot report: fn_8018A514 and fn_80190ABC improved

key_files.role: All-Star mode matching cleanup; simplifies an unrolled copy into a loop and adjusts table/base-pointer access patterns.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801B5624 count_processed/unrolled block replaced by for loop over chars[i]
text_corpus bot report: gm_801B59AC new match, gm_801B5624 and gm_801B5ACC improved

key_files.role: Camera matching work with pragma-scoped noinline and wrapper helper tactics.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmCamera_801A253C pragma dont_inline on/reset and signed local type changes
raw_diff: gmCamera_801A25C8_noinline and gmCamera_801A2650_noinline helper wrappers
text_corpus bot report: gmCamera_801A33BC new match; gmCamera_801A253C and gmCamera_801A292C improved

key_files.role: Opening mode function/body and rodata progress, with automated report noting one .sdata2 regression.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801A9DD0 body added and Vec3 constants introduced
text_corpus bot report: gmopening .rodata new match, gm_801A9DD0 improved, .sdata2 regression

key_files.role: Result-mode matching cleanup using a noinline helper and simplified fn_801771C0 code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_80174284_noinline introduced and pragma push/pop removed

key_files.role: Library/background flash cleanup and prototype/signature recovery for lbBgFlash_80021A10.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: dont_inline pragma block removed around lbBgFlash_800208EC area
raw_diff: lbBgFlash_80021A10 signature changed to void lbBgFlash_80021A10(f32 arg8)

key_files.role: Header declaration added/updated for lbBgFlash surface used by gm_1BA8.

what_changed: Implemented several previously placeholder-marked gm_1BA8 functions, including event character/stage selection, match-exit handling, event-data setup, and randomization logic.
Updated gm_1BA8.h prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to recovered signatures for functions whose bodies or call signatures were clarified.
Removed some pragma dont_inline push/pop blocks in gm_1BA8, gmresult, and lbbgflash, while adding narrower noinline wrapper/helper forms in gm_1BA8 and gmcamera.
Replaced multiple address-style float externs in gm_18A5 with inline float literals such as 0.5f, 415.6922f, 149.0f, 537.0f, 47.0f, and 409.0f.
Changed generated-looking pointer stepping in fn_8018A514 to indexed entries[i] accesses, while keeping src incrementing.
Simplified a generated-looking unrolled copy in gmallstar into a for loop over count and chars[i].
Added includes for gobjproc and itevyoshiegg in gm_1BA8.c to support recovered calls/types.
Automated report recorded matched-code improvement of +572 bytes, matched-data improvement of +24 bytes, 3 new matches, 17 improvements, and one unmatched-item regression in gmopening .sdata2.

smart_moves.text: Recovered header prototypes alongside body recovery in gm_1BA8.h instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS after adding concrete implementations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_1BA8.h prototype updates for gm_801BAC9C, gm_801BBB64, gm_801BC00C, gm_801BC670, gm_801BF128

smart_moves.text: Converted ordinary generated float label externs in gm_18A5 to direct literals, reducing speculative data-symbol surface for values that appear as numeric constants in the diff.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: extern f32 lbl_804DA6A0/lbl_804DA6D4/lbl_804DA6EC/F0/F4/F8 removed and literal uses added

smart_moves.text: Used natural loop form in gmallstar for repeated char copying instead of preserving a large unrolled generated-looking block.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801B5624 unrolled dst[0]..dst[7] copy replaced by for (i = 0; i < count; i++) chars[i] = opp_data[i].x3

smart_moves.text: Kept matching-steering tactics localized where still used, such as specific noinline wrapper chains and local pragma scopes, rather than broad file-level pragma use.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmcamera pragma dont_inline on/reset around narrow functions

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a copied repeated block differs only by an index, a natural for loop can be a better source hypothesis than preserving decompiler-style unrolling.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801B5624 unrolled block replaced with for-loop

decomp_lessons.lesson: For ordinary float constants exposed as address-style externs, inline literals may be preferable when the diff has no data-ownership evidence for named storage.
Body recovery should be paired with truthful header prototypes when signatures become clear from the implementation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_1BA8.h changes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures

decomp_lessons.lesson: Noinline and inline-wrapper steering can improve matching but should remain narrow and evidenced, because these are matching tactics rather than normal style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removal of pragma dont_inline blocks in some files
raw_diff: addition of noinline wrapper helpers in gm_1BA8 and gmcamera

naming_conventions.convention: Recovered functions mostly retained address-style global names such as gm_801BAC9C and fn_8018A514 while improving locals with short role names like ev, exit, stage, idx, inner, cd, ckind, costume, and chars.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_1BA8 function bodies and local declarations

naming_conventions.convention: Matching helper names were formed by appending purpose suffixes such as _inner, _inner2, _inner3, and _noinline to the address-style function name.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801BEFA4_inner/gm_801BEFA4_noinline and gmCamera_801A25C8_noinline helper additions

naming_conventions.convention: Header declarations were made more truthful by replacing unknown placeholders with concrete return and parameter types once recovered.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbbgflash and sislib signature updates

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use direct array indexing to affect code shape while avoiding an extra pointer cursor when later code does not need that cursor.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: fn_8018A514 removes BracketEntry* entry and uses entries[i]

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use PAD_STACK narrowly for local stack-shape adjustment, with this PR reducing one instance from PAD_STACK(0x18) to PAD_STACK(0x10).
Use wrapper call layers to influence inlining/call shape where a direct call did not match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801BEFA4_noinline and gm_801BEFC0_noinline replace direct calls in gm_801BF728

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Switch between pragma dont_inline and helper-wrapper approaches depending on local function needs; the diff both removes old pragma blocks and adds narrow pragma scopes elsewhere.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801BAA60, gmresult, and lbbgflash remove dont_inline blocks
raw_diff: gmcamera adds pragma dont_inline on/reset around specific functions

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Prefer inline literals over address-style float externs when the constant is ordinary and no data ownership evidence is shown.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: gm_18A5 float label externs replaced by literals

review_feedback.feedback: Automated report for GALE01 showed matched code 68.49% (+0.01%, +572 bytes) and matched data 39.77% (+0.00%, +24 bytes).
Reported 3 new matches: gmCamera_801A33BC, gm_801B59AC, and gmopening .rodata.
evidence_refs: text_corpus bot report: 3 new matches table

review_feedback.feedback: Reported 17 improvements in unmatched items, dominated by gm_1BA8 functions including gm_801BC00C, gm_801BB758, gm_801BF128, gm_801BCC9C, gm_801BBB64, gm_801BD028, and gm_801BAC9C.
Reported one regression: main/melee/gm/gmopening .sdata2 decreased from 50.00% to 40.00% (-4 bytes).
No human review comments were present in the loaded slice.

follow_up_queries: gm_1BA8 gm_801BC00C gm_801BB758 gm_801BBB64 gm_801BF128 matching tactics
gm_18A5 lbl_804DA6A0 lbl_804DA6D4 float literal extern cleanup

notes: PR body is empty and there are no human review comments, so author intent and reviewer rationale are not available.
The loaded diff excerpt is truncated, but targeted reads of the local raw diff supplied additional hunks for affected files.
Automated report provides progress/regression data, but the slice does not include full build logs, objdiff command output, or reviewer acceptance reasoning.
Some matching tactics such as PAD_STACK and noinline wrapper layers are visible in the diff, but the exact assembly constraints are not explained in comments.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR 2528: pair body recovery with header prototype cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: When a PR replaces decomp placeholders with concrete bodies, update the owning header prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to the recovered signatures in the same change when the body proves the signature.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR 2528: check generated unrolled copies against natural loops
accepted_candidate_records.text: The gmallstar cleanup shows a generated-looking multi-slot copy can be replaced by a simple indexed loop when each repeated assignment only advances source and destination by the loop index.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801B5624 unrolled copy replaced with for-loop

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR 2528: avoid address-style float externs for ordinary constants without ownership evidence
accepted_candidate_records.text: gm_18A5 removed several extern f32 label declarations and used literals directly, consistent with treating generated constant labels as data-ownership claims that need evidence.

source_update_candidates.title: Consider adding a cautionary example for noinline wrapper chains
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2528 used helper names such as gm_801BEFA4_inner/_inner2/_inner3/_noinline and gmCamera_801A25C8_noinline as narrow matching tactics after also removing some broader dont_inline pragma blocks. This may be worth a standards example emphasizing that wrapper chains are matching tactics requiring verifier evidence, not normal source style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801BEFA4 and gm_801BEFC0 wrapper chains
source_update_candidates.reason: Existing standards cover tactics and pragmas generally, but this PR provides a concrete historical example of wrapper-chain steering that should remain evidence-bound.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all noinline wrapper chains are accepted style; the PR shows their use but does not include rationale or objdiff proof beyond the automated progress report.
Do not promote the gmopening .sdata2 regression as acceptable; the bot only reports it as a regression and the slice contains no reviewer explanation.
Do not infer semantic names for address-style gm_1BA8 functions beyond the signatures and local roles visible in the diff.
Do not treat the merged state as proof that every local tactic is a global standard.
